# DocSmith for Ansible `example-role-ansible-markup` README (for testing)

**This is a mock Ansible role intended for testing purposes only and is not a fully functional role.**

Its `argument_specs.yml` descriptions use [Ansible markup](https://docs.ansible.com/projects/ansible/latest/dev_guide/ansible_markup.html) which `ansible-docsmith` converts into the target documentation format.

<!-- ANSIBLE DOCSMITH MAIN START -->
This line will be replaced as it is between the markers! Any content between them is maintained by `ansible-docsmith`.
<!-- ANSIBLE DOCSMITH MAIN END -->
